Created attachment 223310
Updated patch file

* New version 2.31.0 is released.
* Now that deprecated pcre1 support is removed, remove PCRE option.
* Sort OPTIONS_DEFINE and OPTIONS_DEFAULT.

Release Note: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/git/git/master/Documentation/RelNotes/2.31.0.txt
